sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tung sunni hong tumta a, tawlngakna hong tunga;
bang palh lai-in, Pasian bia ni.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nangma phatna hong kilang, Sang bel

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nuntakna teng a ukpa, van nuai teng Nangma omna;
Na angsungah hong khawm ve, kinai takin.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khua hong mial semsem hangin, a tang
Nang mai kong mu nuam uh hi, Van nuai

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Aksite le zan le sun, mu ngei nawnlo ding a hun;
Tawntung zing khuavak sakta’n, kote’ mai-ah.
